chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1136 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection No.22 2. For hearing on CMA No. 5853/2025 3. For hearing of Main Case 21-03-2025 M/s. Muhammad Ahmed Masood and Syed Naveed Hussain Wasti Advocates for the Petitioner Rana Sakhawat Ali Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Saleh Muhammad Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Ms. Hira Khan, DC Customs West The Petitioner presses this petition to the extent of his grievance that its WEBOC ID has been blocked by the Customs Authority without issuance of any show cause notice and contrary to the manner prescribed by Section 155F of the Customs Act, 1969. Pursuant to the last order Ms. Hira Khan, DC Customs West is present and states that the relevant block shall be withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the authority to initiate appropriate proceedings permissible under the law in general and the aforementioned section in particular. In view hereof, learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and attendance of the Customs official is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad PS
